questions.question: The sixth bowl is poured on what river, drying it up?
questions.feedback: The sixth bowl dried up the great river Euphrates.

questions.question: Where do the kings of the earth gather for battle?
questions.feedback: They gathered the kings to the place called Armageddon.

questions.question: People repented and gave God glory after the plagues.
questions.feedback: They cursed God and refused to repent.

questions.question: The seventh bowl was poured into the air, and a loud voice from the throne said: It is _____!
questions.feedback: A loud voice said: It is done!

questions.question: Huge _____ of about a hundred pounds each fell on people from the sky.
questions.feedback: Enormous hailstones fell on people from the sky.
